label: haunts
description: The software entity this daimon or revenant is spiritually bound to. Use when a mythological being is the animating spirit of a program.

label: invoked by
description: The ritual, incantation, or invocation pattern used to summon this daimon. String-valued (e.g. a shell command).

label: aspect of
description: A broader divine or mythological concept this daimon embodies. String-valued (e.g. 'routing', 'time', 'memory').

label: realm
description: The mythological domain or underworld layer this daimon inhabits. String-valued (e.g. 'scheduler-underworld', 'routing-labyrinth').

label: binds to
description: Another daimon this one is ritually paired with, forming a dyad. Symmetric.
